claim: MCP servers provide tools and resources to AI agents via the Model Context Protocol, enabling agents to call APIs, save data, query databases, and extend capabilities beyond their native abilities.
actionable: Identify external capabilities your agents need (API access, database queries, file I/O); build MCP servers to expose these as tools or resources.
source_title: Build Anything With a CUSTOM MCP Server - Python Tutorial

claim: MCP Python SDK with UV package manager simplifies server creation: use fastmcp for quick setup, decorate functions with @mcp.tool to expose tools, @mcp.resource for data endpoints, and @mcp.prompt for reusable prompts.
actionable: Use UV instead of pip for package management; leverage fastmcp decorators to quickly expose Python functions as MCP tools; include docstrings to document tool behavior for the agent.
source_title: Build Anything With a CUSTOM MCP Server - Python Tutorial

claim: Docstrings are critical for MCP tools: the agent reads docstrings to understand when to use a tool; without clear documentation, the agent won't know when to trigger the tool even if it's available.
actionable: Write comprehensive docstrings for every MCP tool explaining what it does, what parameters it accepts, and what it returns; be specific about when the tool should be used.
source_title: Build Anything With a CUSTOM MCP Server - Python Tutorial

claim: Resources expose data (GET-like endpoints) while tools perform actions; prompts are reusable templates for agent interactions; combining all three enables rich agent capabilities.
actionable: Use resources for read-only data retrieval (configuration, latest records), tools for write/action operations (add note, call API), and prompts for reusable interaction patterns.
source_title: Build Anything With a CUSTOM MCP SERVER - Python Tutorial

claim: Common MCP setup issue: if the MCP server doesn't appear in Claude Desktop after installation, force quit Claude and reopen it; if that fails, use absolute paths to the UV executable in config.
actionable: When MCP servers don't show up, force quit the agent app and restart; if persisting, find the absolute path to your package manager executable and hardcode it in the MCP configuration.
source_title: Build Anything With a CUSTOM MCP Server - Python Tutorial

claim: MCP enables scalable AI automation: instead of manual scripts or fake data, connect MCP tools to agents and let them autonomously perform operations (create users, modify databases) on demand.
actionable: Identify repetitive manual tasks in your workflow (data generation, API calls, database modifications); expose them via MCP tools so agents can automate them.
source_title: Build Anything With a CUSTOM MCP SERVER - Python Tutorial
